description: The Mercedes-Benz CLK 63 AMG Black Series, produced from 2007 to 2009, was one of the first AMG Black Series cars. Its naturally aspirated 6.2-litre V8 produced 507 bhp, paired with wider bodywork, stiffer suspension, and rear-wheel drive. Just 700 were built worldwide, making it a rare and sought-after collector's item.
